view.title: Validate persona scenario #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of data deletion cascading to third parties.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of data deletion cascading to third parties.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of data deletion affecting third parties, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this behavior or its expected results. The linked use cases and personas do not include specific API interactions or validations that confirm the cascading effect of data deletion. Therefore, the lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
